intent_unclear.en: I'm not sure I understood correctly. Are you looking for {option_a} or {option_b}?
intent_unclear.ne: मैले सही बुझिनँ जस्तो लाग्छ। तपाईं {option_a} वा {option_b} खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ?

missing_slot_budget.en: To give you the best recommendations, what's your approximate budget level?
missing_slot_budget.ne: उत्तम सुझाव दिन, तपाईंको अनुमानित बजेट कति हो?

missing_slot_duration.en: How many days do you have for this trip?
missing_slot_duration.ne: यो यात्राको लागि तपाईंसँग कति दिन छ?

missing_slot_activity.en: What type of experience interests you most - adventure, culture, or relaxation?
missing_slot_activity.ne: तपाईंलाई कस्तो अनुभवमा बढी रुचि छ - साहस, संस्कृति, वा आराम?

multiple_matches.en: I found several options. Would you prefer {option_a} or {option_b}?
multiple_matches.ne: मैले धेरै विकल्पहरू फेला पारेँ। तपाईं {option_a} वा {option_b} मन पराउनुहुन्छ?

confirm_recommendation.en: Based on your preferences, I recommend {destination}. Would you like more details?
confirm_recommendation.ne: तपाईंको रुचि अनुसार, म {destination} सुझाउँछु। के तपाईं विस्तृत जानकारी चाहनुहुन्छ?
